summary: CapyMatch Kanban D&D Insertion Line System - All 10 features verified. CONFIRMED: Insertion line appears with 2px height, column accent color at 45% opacity, 120ms fade-in animation, and 6px circular dot endpoints. Card uses scale(1.02) with NO rotation during drag, visible with z-index 9999. Library handles card shifting. Drop confirms with toast 'Moved to X'.

issues: Minor warning: 'Updating border borderLeft' - style property conflict during rerender. Not critical but could be cleaned up.

critical_code_review_comments: insertAt calculation correct: only shows when dragDest.sourceId !== col.key (cross-column drag only)
Insertion line uses absolute positioning (top: -5) for between-card placement
Insertion line uses relative positioning for end-of-list placement
onDragUpdate correctly tracks destination via dragDest state
Card composedTransform uses scale(1.02) with NO rotate - changed from previous 1.04 rotate(1deg)
Insertion line CSS has ::before/::after pseudo-elements with 6px circular dots
Animation uses 120ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) with opacity fade 0→0.45
Column activation uses gradient background + inset shadow + scale(1.008)
Settle animation is 350ms with neutral shadows (no teal)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data. Cards moved during testing for verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kanban D&D insertion line system fully verified. KEY VALUES: scale(1.02) NO rotate, insertion line 2px height with column color at 45% opacity, 120ms animation, 6px dot endpoints (border-radius 50%), shows only in TARGET column (not source). Card positions after test: Added(0), Outreach(3), Talking(2-3), Visit(1), Offered(1).

verified_features.kanban_board_5_lanes: ✅ PASS - All 5 lanes visible: Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offered
verified_features.card_visible_during_drag: ✅ PASS - Card opacity=1, z-index=9999, visible floating above board
verified_features.card_scale_102_no_rotate: ✅ PASS - Transform: matrix(1.02, 0, 0, 1.02, 0, 0) - scale(1.02) with NO rotation
verified_features.insertion_line_appears: ✅ PASS - Insertion line appears in TARGET column during cross-column drag
verified_features.insertion_line_column_color: ✅ PASS - Uses column accent color (e.g., rgb(168, 85, 247) for Offered)
verified_features.insertion_line_only_target: ✅ PASS - Insertion line shows only in target column (filtered by sourceId !== col.key)
verified_features.insertion_line_disappears: ✅ PASS - Insertion line disappears when dragDest becomes null or after drop
verified_features.toast_moved_to_x: ✅ PASS - Toast 'Moved to X' appears after successful drop
verified_features.column_activation_gradient: ✅ PASS - Column uses linear-gradient background during drag-over
verified_features.column_activation_scale: ✅ PASS - Column scale(1.008) when receiving drag
verified_features.column_activation_inner_glow: ✅ PASS - Inset shadow for inner glow effect
verified_features.header_contrast_boost: ✅ PASS - Header color boosts on isDraggingOver
verified_features.empty_column_state: ✅ PASS - Empty columns show state text, hide when insertion line appears

insertion_line_verification.background: Column accent color (e.g., rgb(168, 85, 247) for purple/Offered)

code_locations_verified.insertion_line_calculation: line 386 (insertAt = dragDest && droppableId === col.key && sourceId !== col.key)
